title: haplopappus squarrosus var. obtusus
intro: Haplopappus squarrosus var. obtusus is a plant species in the daisy family, native to North America, characterized by its hairy stems, narrow leaves, and small yellow flower heads. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Haplopappus squarrosus var. obtusus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potential benefits in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
